commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then they shall confess their sin which they have done: and he shall make restitution for his trespass with the principal thereof, and add unto it the fifth part thereof, and give it unto him against whom he has trespassed. Shall confess. This confession and satisfaction, ordained in the old law, was a figure of the sacrament of penance. (Challoner) A special confession of their sin, with satisfaction, and a sacrifice, are required. So Christ orders us to lay open our consciences to his priests, John. (Worthington).

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Shall confess: This confession and satisfaction, ordained in the Old Law, was a figure of the sacrament of penance.
